parameters.name: range
parameters.description: Time range to filter transactions. Use "period" together with "from" and "to" for a custom date range.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Start of the custom date range (ISO 8601). Required when range="period".

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: End of the custom date range (ISO 8601). Required when range="period".

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque pagination cursor, taken from a previous nextCursor.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of transactions to return per page.

parameters.name: range
parameters.description: Time range to summarize transactions. Use "period" together with "from" and "to" for a custom date range.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Start of the custom summary date range (ISO 8601). Required when range="period".

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: End of the custom summary date range (ISO 8601). Required when range="period".

400.description: Invalid request body or category/type combination.

404.description: Personal transaction or account not found.

refreshToken.description: The refresh token issued at login or previous refresh

accountId.description: Account to record the transaction in. Defaults to the user's default account when omitted.

expenseKind.description: Expense kind. Applies only to expense transactions and defaults to variable when omitted.

amount.description: Transaction amount. Must be a positive number.

category.description: Category name. Allowed values depend on the transaction type.

occurredAt.description: Date and time the transaction occurred (ISO 8601).

note.description: Optional free-text note, up to 200 characters.

expenseKind.description: Updated expense kind. Applies only to expense transactions.

amount.description: Updated transaction amount. Must be a positive number.

category.description: Updated category name. Allowed values depend on the transaction type.

accountId.description: Updated account that owns the transaction.

occurredAt.description: Updated date and time the transaction occurred (ISO 8601).

note.description: Updated free-text note, up to 200 characters. Use null to clear it.
